def negative_same_dataset_normalized_in_multiple_full_passes():
    rule_id = "same_dataset_normalized_in_multiple_full_passes"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag code that walks the same dataset several times for normalization steps that can be fused."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
